ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_code" INTEGER /* Unique code identifying the zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic zone */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of zone (e.g., urban, rural, coastal) */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Boundary coordinates of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "tb_idn" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic record */,
  "zone_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone this record pertains to */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of observations in the zone */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area covered in the zone (in km²) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value observed in the zone */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value observed in the zone */,
  "range_value" REAL /* Range of values observed */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean of values observed */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of values */,
  "sum_value" REAL /* Total sum of values */,
  "variety" INTEGER /* Variety of unique values */,
  "majority" REAL /* Majority value observed */,
  "minority" REAL /* Minority value observed */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of observations */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_status" TEXT /* Status of data quality (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tb_idn"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_zone_code FOREIGN KEY ("zone_code") REFERENCES zones ("zone_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., sensor, survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., Remote Sensing, Ground Sampling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., active, passive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "tb_idn" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics record for which the report is generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_reports_tb_idn FOREIGN KEY ("tb_idn") REFERENCES statistics ("tb_idn")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "tb_idn" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tb_idn FOREIGN KEY ("tb_idn") REFERENCES statistics ("tb_idn"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis report from which the visualization is generated */,
  "visual_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visual_data" TEXT /* Data used for visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES data_analysis_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality check */,
  "tb_idn" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics record being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_tb_idn FOREIGN KEY ("tb_idn") REFERENCES statistics ("tb_idn")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_logs" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "tb_idn" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistics record being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of export */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported data (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_logs_tb_idn FOREIGN KEY ("tb_idn") REFERENCES statistics ("tb_idn")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_import_logs" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user importing the data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of import */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "import_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported data (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
